name: GPT-4o
summary: OpenAI's flagship multimodal model with real-time audio, vision, and text capabilities.
summary_zh: OpenAI旗舰多模态模型，具备实时音频、视觉和文本能力。

name: o3

summary_zh: OpenAI最强大的推理模型，专为复杂多步骤问题优化。

name: o4-mini

name: Claude 3.7 Sonnet

name: Claude 3.5 Haiku

name: Gemini 2.0 Flash

name: Gemini 2.0 Flash Thinking

summary: xAI's flagship model trained on Colossus supercluster, with strong reasoning capabilities.

name: Llama 4 Scout
summary: Meta's multimodal MoE model with 17B active parameters and 10M token context window.

name: Llama 4 Maverick
summary: Meta's high-performance multimodal MoE model with 17B active parameters and 128 experts.

summary: Mistral's most powerful model with 128K context, strong code and reasoning performance.
